text.title: Cohort-Based Mini-Course Launch Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Cohort-Based Mini-Course Launch output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: platform mix includes ≥3 separate tools for first cohort

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: cohort_size_target populated with a typed value
duration_weeks populated with a typed value
pricing populated with a typed value
platform_pick populated with a typed value
lead_magnet_plan populated with a typed value
review_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
